mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tradePost (tradePostNo, tradeTitle, tradeContent, cost, status, customer, memberNo, createDate) VALUES (tradePost_seq.NEXTVAL, #{tradeTitle}, #{tradeContent}, #{cost}, #{status}, #{customer}, #{memberNo}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO tradeImage (tradeImgNo, tradeImgUrl, tradePostNo) VALUES (tradeImg_seq.NEXTVAL, #{param2}, #{param1})
mapper.select: SELECT tp.tradePostNo, tp.tradeTitle, tp.tradeContent, tp.cost, tp.status, tp.customer, tp.memberNo, tp.createDate, (SELECT ti.tradeImgUrl FROM tradeImage ti WHERE ti.tradePostNo = tp.tradePostNo AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbnailUrl FROM tradePost tp WHERE tp.tradePostNo = #{tradePostNo}
